name: py2neo (Python Neo4j Client)
pricing_notes: Open source (Apache-2.0); Nigel Small / py2neo-org (note: py2neo is now in maintenance mode — prefer official neo4j driver for new projects)

performance.notes: Network-bound; Bolt protocol overhead per query

agent_readiness.notes: High-level Neo4j Python client with OGM. from py2neo import Graph, Node, Relationship. g = Graph('bolt://localhost:7687', auth=('neo4j', 'password')). tx = g.begin(). a = Node('Person', name='Alice'). b = Node('Person', name='Bob'). ab = Relationship(a, 'KNOWS', b). tx.create(ab). g.commit(tx). Cypher: g.run('MATCH (p:Person) RETURN p').data(). NodeMatcher: g.nodes.match('Person', name='Alice').first(). OGM: from py2neo.ogm import GraphObject, Property, RelatedTo. class Person(GraphObject): name = Property(); friends = RelatedTo('Person'). push(), pull(). NodeMatcher, RelationshipMatcher.

gotchas: py2neo is in maintenance mode — prefer official neo4j Python driver for new projects
OGM (GraphObject) has limitations vs full ORM — complex schemas may need raw Cypher
No type annotations — limited IDE support
py2neo 2021.x dropped Py2Neo OGM features available in older versions
Transaction API differs from official neo4j driver — harder to migrate
best_when: Quick prototype with py2neo's higher-level API
avoid_when: New projects — use official neo4j Python driver instead
summary: py2neo is a high-level Python Neo4j client with OGM. Graph('bolt://...').run(cypher). Node, Relationship creation. GraphObject OGM with Property/RelatedTo. Apache-2.0 by Nigel Small. NOW IN MAINTENANCE MODE — use official neo4j driver for new projects. No type annotations. Limited Neo4j 5.x support. OGM is simpler but less powerful than full ORM. Good only for maintaining existing py2neo codebases.
